'''Tulak''' was a male [[Advozse/Legends|Advozse]] [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]]. He conquered [[Koba]] three centuries before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], imprisoning the native [[Koban]]s. [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Polvin Kut]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Yaddle/Legends|Yaddle]] went there to stop him. However, Tulak was more than ready and when the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] arrived, he ambushed them. His forces killed Kut and captured Yaddle. After Tulak had her tortured, his men threw her in a dungeon in hopes she could be of some use.

By the time Yaddle escaped, over a [[Standard century/Legends|century]] later, Tulak had died, and his son, [[Kalut]] was the new Warlord.

==Appearances==
